scripts.actor-critic: sh -c 'mkdir -p runs; if lsof -nP -iTCP:51739 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsx src/index.ts strategy-loop "$@"; else (cd .local-tools/mgba-http && ./mGBA-http > ../../runs/.mgba-http.log 2>&1) & bridge=$!; sleep 1; tsx src/index.ts strategy-loop "$@"; code=$?; kill $bridge 2>/dev/null || true; exit $code; fi' --
scripts.actor-critic:forever: sh -c 'mkdir -p runs; port=${PORT:-3030}; iterations=${ITERATIONS:-1000000}; max_steps=${MAX_STEPS:-120}; poll_ms=${POLL_MS:-1000}; llm_every=${LLM_EVERY:-4}; run_prefix=${RUN_ID_PREFIX:-continuous}; tsx src/index.ts movement-monitor --iterations "$iterations" --poll-ms "$poll_ms" --port "$port" > runs/.movement-monitor-forever.log 2>&1 & monitor=$!; trap "kill $monitor 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; npm run actor-critic -- --iterations "$iterations" --max-steps "$max_steps" --poll-ms "$poll_ms" --llm-every "$llm_every" --run-id-prefix "$run_prefix" --port "$port"'
